Short CV

He was born in Adana in 1995. In 2013, he graduated from Seyhan Rotary Anatolian High School. After graduating from Bolu Abant İzzet Baysal University Faculty of Medicine in 2020, he worked as a General Practitioner at Prof. Dr. Feriha Öz Emergency Hospital of Istanbul Sancaktepe Şehit Prof. Dr. İlhan Varank Training and Research Hospital for 7 months. After working as a Research Assistant Doctor in the field of Obstetrics and Gynecology at Istanbul Provincial Health Directorate Bağcılar Training and Research Hospital, which he won with the Medical Specialty Examination, for 6 months, and as a Research Assistant Doctor in the field of Obstetrics and Gynecology at T.C. Istanbul Sancaktepe Şehit Prof. Dr. İlhan Varank Training and Research Hospital for 8 months, he waived his duty here and worked as a Research Assistant Doctor in the field of Obstetrics and Gynecology. C. He worked as a General Practitioner at Prof. Dr. Feriha Öz Emergency Hospital affiliated to Istanbul Sancaktepe Şehit Prof. Dr. İlhan Varank Training and Research Hospital for 1 month in Chest Diseases service, 1 month in Palliative Care service and 11 months in Pediatric Intensive Care Unit in Çekmeköy State Hospital. During his medical school education, he served in certain NGOs such as University Medical Faculty Representative, Bolu Young Volunteers Provincial Representative. At the end of 2023, Tuğba BAŞYİĞİT started to work as a Research Assistant at Üsküdar University Faculty of Medicine, Department of Mental Health and Diseases and continues her medical specialty training in the field of Psychiatry.
